unit: plan (multi-plan phase; entries below are PLANS)

completed_tasks.name: harness extension: new check-kerievsky.mjs (27-name identity + 3 fields + 3 Away + README mirror) + extend extract-samples/check-crossrefs/check-smells
Ch.6 Creation leaves (6) -- oracle-converged 6/6 (R1 1 pass/5 revise, R2 5 pass, 0 escalations)
oracle + oracle-reviewer ALWAYS chunk-read to EOF (length-agnostic; token-cap-aware); agent-reviewed (firewall SAFE + correctness PASS) + RELOADED live

remaining_tasks.name: Ch.7 Simplification leaves (6) -- LARGEST source chapter ~40K tok: Compose Method, Replace Conditional Logic with Strategy, Move Embellishment to Decorator, Replace State-Altering Conditionals with State, Replace Implicit Tree with Composite, Replace Conditional Dispatcher with Command

Ch.8 Generalization leaves (7): Form Template Method, Extract Composite, Replace One/Many Distinctions with Composite, Replace Hard-Coded Notifications with Observer, Unify Interfaces with Adapter, Extract Adapter, Replace Implicit Language with Interpreter
Ch.9 Protection (3) + Ch.10 Accumulation (2) + Ch.11 Utilities (3) = 8 leaves; incl. 3rd Away case Move Accumulation to Visitor; 3 Utilities may carry GoF pattern 'n/a -- utility'
Ch.4 smell fold + dedup (source-tagged) + finalize kerievsky README index + reconcile check-kerievsky NAMES to authored slugs + FULL battery GREEN + claude plugin validate = phase gate

human_actions_pending.action: Re-confirm pacing for the remaining 4 plans (continue all / one chapter at a time)
human_actions_pending.context: The pacing AskUserQuestion was set aside; owner paused for a fresh session.

human_actions_pending.action: After ANY future oracle/agent instruction change is reviewed+committed, run /reload-plugins before proceeding
human_actions_pending.context: owner standing rule; only the user can run /reload-plugins

decisions.decision: Execution runs INLINE in the main context (D-08) -- NOT gsd-executor, NOT worktrees
decisions.rationale: the clean-room loop needs Agent (spawn oracle/oracle-reviewer) + AskUserQuestion (owner escalation); gsd-executor has neither. This is the Phase-7 failure mode carried forward -- BLOCKING.

decisions.decision: oracle/oracle-reviewer ALWAYS chunk-read .oracle sources to EOF (length-agnostic)
decisions.rationale: Read tool ~25K-tok cap; Ch.6/7/8 exceed it so a single Read dropped the tail. Fix in the AGENT contracts (not per-call size hints). Reviewed + reloaded.

decisions.decision: STANDING RULE: any agent/skill instruction change must be agent-reviewed before acceptance
decisions.rationale: owner rule; instructions are load-bearing behavioral contracts; saved to auto-memory

decisions.decision: STANDING RULE: after an oracle/agent change is reviewed+committed, escalate to owner to run /reload-plugins and WAIT before proceeding (no inline-reminder workaround)
decisions.rationale: committed != live until reload; owner runs it; saved to auto-memory

decisions.decision: GoF target-name corrections settled by oracle in Ch.6: Move Creation Knowledge to Factory + Encapsulate Classes with Factory target a plain Factory (NOT Abstract Factory)

next_action: Resume 08-03 (Ch.7 Simplification). Read 08-03-PLAN.md. Author the 6 leaves BLIND in the LOCKED Fowler leaf format (single # H1 + Use when: + ## Motivation (intent leads) + ## Mechanics + ## Example + optional ## Watch for) PLUS the 3 Kerievsky field labels (Composed Fowler primitive(s): / Direction: / GoF pattern:), original TS examples in domains UNRELATED to the source. Run the DETERMINISTIC layer FIRST (node extract-samples.mjs tsc + check-hygiene + field-presence rg + composed-link resolution), fix blind, THEN gate via oracle-reviewer (SOURCE=.oracle/refactoring-to-patterns/index.md + 'Ch.7 -- Simplification'; NO sizes -- the reloaded agent self-chunks to EOF; axes = refactoring-leaf defaults + direction + target_pattern anchors). Revise blind to all-pass; escalate non-convergence/unresolvable GoF via AskUserQuestion. Commit the chapter + 08-03-SUMMARY. Ch.7 is the biggest chapter -- sanity-check the oracle verdicts for incomplete-read signatures.
context_notes: Phase 8 = Kerievsky analog of Phase 7's LOCKED clean-room model (07-ROUTING-ARCHITECTURE.md + 07-ORACLE-MODEL.md). 6/27 leaves done (Ch.6). FIREWALL (blocking): main context NEVER reads .oracle/ (ls for names/sizes only); only the oracle/oracle-reviewer subagents read book prose. Per chapter: author blind -> deterministic-checks-FIRST -> oracle-reviewer gate (sub-batch the chapter's leaves in one call, ~6-8) -> revise blind -> converge (~3 round cap). check-kerievsky is RED-by-design until 08-06 adds the README rows + reconciles NAMES; extract-samples/check-crossrefs/check-smells stay GREEN. The 3 named Away (de-patterning) cases: Encapsulate Composite with Builder + Inline Singleton (both DONE in Ch.6) and Move Accumulation to Visitor (08-05). Wave-2 plans do NOT touch README.md or any checker .mjs (08-06 owns those).
